generated_for_sub_pass: §1.2 Supabase Implementation 0.5 — Provider Login Initiation Surface
component_births_after_this_pass: bounded GitHub provider login initiation utility
bounded provider login initiation page script

login_initiation_behavior.provider_login_scope: signInWithOAuth may be called only when public runtime config exists, the conditional client initializes, the allowed provider is supplied, and the function is explicitly invoked.
login_initiation_behavior.credential_capture_scope: No repository credential fields, password login, signup, or account registration are implemented.

claimable_after_this_pass: A bounded provider login initiation surface exists; the repo can initiate a Supabase OAuth provider flow when externally supplied public config is present.

next_threshold.name: §1.2 Supabase Implementation 0.6 — Callback Route or Protected Shell Authorization Boundary
next_threshold.purpose: Separately authorize a callback route or protected shell boundary without conflating provider login initiation with Authenticated Surfaces birth.

hard_boundaries_preserved: Provider initiation uses GitHub OAuth through Supabase and does not collect repository credentials.

No password login, signup UI, account registration, protected route entry, protected shell entry, authenticated workspace, backend, database access, persistence layer, RLS, tenant isolation, customer workspace, billing, Palisade, Weave runtime, or public NEXUS runtime is implemented.
No callback route is created in this pass.
No Supabase runtime public config values or package files are committed.
Server-secret names remain bounded to validators and data records as forbidden terms.
